title: Secrets Management (External Secrets API)
description: Master secure secrets management practices in Kubernetes using tools like the External Secrets API. Architect the secure injection of sensitive data from external vaults (e.g., Vault, AWS Secrets Manager) without persisting plain-text in etcd.
objectives: Master secure secrets management practices in Kubernetes using tools like the External Secrets API.
Architect the secure injection of sensitive data from external vaults (e.g., Vault, AWS Secrets Manager) without persisting plain-text in etcd.
